text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara and I are having a chat as we make
our way back from an exhibition race for an
event.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Aww, I lost again. But next time I'm gonna win for
sure!
choice_data_list: Let's train harder from now on.
Let's train harder from now on.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's do it!

She's always smiling, no matter how many times
she loses. She always tries her best and looks on
the brighter side of things. I really want her to win
for once.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Hey, isn't that the racer who placed last today?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah. What's her name? Haru Urara, right?
I think I can hear gossiping from far away...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
You think she held back because it's not a real
race?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Nah, she always loses. She's never won once since
her debut.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Wow. That's actually pretty amazing in itself.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? They're talking about me!
Haru Urara rushes over to the gossipers.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you saw me race today, yeah? You just
called me amazing, right?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: W-well, uh...

I catch up to her. Haru Urara is inches away from
the gossiping man, who looks like he's shriveling
up. Her eyes are filled with sparkles...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee, it's true! I am amazing!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I love to run, but I don't usually go very fast.
That's why I'm always losing!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: I-is that so...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
But next time I'm gonna win for really-reals! And
then you can say "Wow, she won!"

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So, please come watch me again!

text_block_list.name: Spectators A and B
text_block_list.text: ...Sure.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I'm off! See ya!

text_block_list.name: Spectators A and B
text_block_list.text: Uh...

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
You know... I kinda want to cheer her on now. She
seems like she tries really hard.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Same.

Fans are very important for an Umamusume. Haru
Urara's natural talent for gaining support will be a
huge boon for her.

But, we still need to focus on getting her some
wins. These thoughts race through my mind as I
chase after her.
